# sixtom

> Pair Sprints by Sam D'Angelo, lead engineer at Made In Cookware ($200M/yr DTC). I pair with your team's domain experts for a week and ship the internal tool, system, or operating layer they've been stuck on. $7,500 fixed. One client per month.

## What it is

- One-week pair sprint. I embed with one of your team's domain experts.
- We pair on the system, internal tool, or operating layer that's been stuck at 90%.
- You keep the code, the patterns, and the working knowledge.
- The thesis: most teams get to 90% with AI. The last 10% — production-readiness, shape, reusability — is engineering work. That's what I bring.

## Who it's for

- Founders, operators, and department heads at companies trying to operate at AI speed.
- Teams with a vibe-coded prototype that won't ship, or an internal tool that won't scale past one person.
- Companies whose domain experts can prototype with AI but can't get to production without an engineer to shape the work.

## What I've built

- A centralized operations tool serving every department at a $200M/yr DTC brand in two months (Made In Cookware).
- LinkedIn / content drip systems with Telegram + AI + scheduler pipelines.
- A pattern of taking domain experts' 30k-line vibe-coded prototypes down to 10k clean, tested, reusable lines.

## Pricing

- $7,500 USD, fixed.
- One client per month, by appointment.
- If we're not on track by day 3, we pause; the client keeps what's been built and pays only for time spent.

## How to engage

- Book a 30-min intro call: https://sixtom.com (link from the homepage).
- Notify list (signup form on the homepage) for next available sprint slot.
